name: Suresh Purini
bio: Works on parallel programming, compilers, and GPU computing. Teaches compilers and operating systems.

name: Manish Shrivastava
bio: Research in NLP, information extraction, and computational linguistics with a focus on Indian languages.

name: Vasudeva Varma
bio: Works on information retrieval, web mining, and social media analysis. Former Dean of IIIT Hyderabad.

name: Vineet Gandhi
bio: Research in computer vision, video understanding, and visual tracking.

name: Anoop Namboodiri
bio: Works on document analysis, biometrics, and pattern recognition.

name: Kamalakar Karlapalem
bio: Research in databases, knowledge management, and multi-agent systems.

name: Kishore Kothapalli
bio: Works on parallel algorithms, graph algorithms, and GPU computing.

name: Sujit Gujar
bio: Research in algorithmic game theory, mechanism design, and machine learning.

name: Madhava Krishna
bio: Research in robot perception, motion planning, and autonomous navigation.

name: Girish Varma
bio: Works on computational complexity, algorithms, and machine learning theory.

name: Praveen Paruchuri
bio: Research in multi-agent systems, reinforcement learning, and AI planning.

name: Bapi Raju
bio: Computational neuroscience, cognitive science, and brain-computer interfaces.
